title: Globalisation, power and politics
summary: 9699 — TNCs, nation-states, global governance, and power in a global age.
learningObjectives: Analyse the power of transnational corporations.
Evaluate the role of nation-states under globalisation.
Explain global governance: IMF, World Bank, WTO, UN.
Assess Marxist and world-systems views of global power.

simpleExplanation.title: Who runs the global show?
simpleExplanation.summary: TNCs and international institutions wield enormous influence, but nation-states and social movements still shape global politics.
steps: Global institutions — regulate trade and debt.

sections.content: **Global power** (7.3) completes Topic 7. Balance **optimist** and **critical** accounts of global governance.
